title: Alpha public seed claim

claim.text: The alpha seed should enter SAB only as a challengeable claim, not as standing.
claim.scope: SAB agent seeding protocol v1 schema fixtures.
claim.decision_context: Used to verify the first protocol schema lane.
success_conditions: The packet validates only with authority, challenge, evidence, privacy, and signature fields.
failure_conditions: The packet is treated as standing before challenge and witness review.

operator_backing.disclosure: Single disclosed human operator for this seed lane.

authority_lease.scope: Submit one public seed packet for challenge and witness review.

strongest_objections: The packet could be mistaken for standing if standing basis is not explicit.
falsification_routes: Show that the seed can grant reliance without a witnessed challenge.

build_plan.production_grade_definition: Schema validation fixtures pass and invalid authority shortcuts fail.

anti_capture_rules: External identity attestations cannot grant standing.

commons_return.minimum_return: Schema and fixture corpus remain public.

canon_conditions: Valid fixtures pass and targeted invalid fixtures fail.
compost_conditions: Any object can grant standing from identity or reputation alone.
